data.title: skill-refs check fails on fix-bug-skill-directive.sh and reviewer-delta-deep-arch.md unqualified refs
data.description: check-skill-refs.sh reports 5 unqualified /fix-bug refs in fix-bug-skill-directive.sh (in comment lines) and reviewer-delta-deep-arch.md. Pre-existing on main, unrelated to epic a171-6c65.
